EXAMPLE_TABLE.table_comment: REPLACE — one-paragraph description of what this table holds, its grain, and the most important caveat (e.g. 'WORKORDER is the work-order header — one row per WO, current state only. Filter to WOCLASS = WORKORDER for normal WOs.').

columns.ID: REPLACE — what the column means + valid values + the gotcha (e.g. 'Unique within SITEID. Always include SITEID in joins.').
columns.STATUS: REPLACE — current status. For history, use the parallel *STATUS table.
columns.SITEID: REPLACE — site code. Composite-key partner for ID.

EXAMPLE_HISTORY_TABLE.table_comment: REPLACE — one row per status change. Use this (not EXAMPLE_TABLE) for any 'history' or 'time-in-state' question.

columns.CHANGEDATE: REPLACE — when the change was made.
columns.STATUS: REPLACE — the status this row represents.
columns.CHANGEBY: REPLACE — user who made the change.
